name: dexa-wfh-attendance
description: Dexa Group fullstack technical test: WFH attendance app with React, NestJS microservices, and MySQL.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @dexa/contracts && npm run build -w @dexa/auth-service && npm run build -w @dexa/employee-service && npm run build -w @dexa/attendance-service && npm run build -w @dexa/api-gateway && npm run build -w @dexa/frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w @dexa/contracts && npm run build -w @dexa/auth-service && npm run build -w @dexa/employee-service && npm run build -w @dexa/attendance-service && npm run build -w @dexa/api-gateway
scripts.verify: npm audit --omit=dev && npm run build && npm run test
